articles.title: Binance Freezes $4.2 Million in XRP to Aid Ripple Recover Stolen Funds
articles.description: The recent XRP hack involving Ripple Co-founder Chris Larsen has created shockwaves in the crypto community and XRP Army. In the latest development, Binance, one of the leading crypto exchanges, has announced its strategic move to help Ripple recover the stolen amount by freezing about $4.2 million worth of stolen XRP.
